# Escola Liberal — Plataforma Educacional para Adultos 18+
# https://escolaliberal.com.br

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /index.html
Allow: /contato.html
Allow: /termos.html
Allow: /privacidade.html
Allow: /blog.html
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /institucional.html
Allow: /cert.html
Disallow: /app.html
Disallow: /admin.html
Disallow: /admin-stripe
Disallow: /auth.html
Disallow: /perfil.html
Disallow: /admin-stripe.html
Disallow: /admin-stripe-MSI.html
Disallow: /supabase-schema.sql
Disallow: /supabase-client.js
Disallow: /stripe-billing.js
Disallow: /cookie-consent.js
Disallow: /stripe-webhook.ts
Disallow: /create-checkout.ts
Disallow: /lessons.json
Disallow: /lessons/
Disallow: /src/
Disallow: /scripts/
Disallow: /qa/
Disallow: /supabase/
Disallow: /CLAUDE.md
Disallow: /SECURITY-AUDIT.md
Disallow: /SECURITY.md
Disallow: /LICENSE.md
Disallow: /admin-blog.html
Disallow: /blog/drafts/

# Bloqueio de bots de scraping conhecidos (anti-cloning)
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /
User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: cohere-ai
Disallow: /
User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /
User-agent: ImagesiftBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: Omgilibot
Disallow: /
User-agent: FacebookBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: Diffbot
Disallow: /

# Googlebot específico — permitir crawl de imagens
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /assets/icons/og-image.png
Allow: /assets/icons/icon-512.png

# Googlebot-Image
User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /assets/

Sitemap: https://escolaliberal.com.br/sitemap.xml
